0.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Sana Serif", Roboto, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif, Avenir, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

xxl.description: Figma only. Use as the max-width on xl media query.

sm.description: Compact components that leverage smaller typography, like Pills or Status Indicator

xxl.description: Flat or raised surfaces, like Cards or Menu

raised.description: Separates a layer from the surface, e.g. table headers or sticky elements

default.description: Hover state overlay for interactive containers

inverse.description: Hover overlay for containers on dark backgrounds

default.description: Pressed state overlay for interactive containers

inverse.description: Pressed overlay for containers on dark backgrounds

raised.description: Semi-transparent backdrop behind modals and dialogs

scrim.description: Semi-transparent backdrop behind modals and dialogs

mixin.description: Pressed state overlay for interactive containers

default.description: De-emphasized container background for secondary information

loading.description: Background for skeleton loaders and loading states

default.description: Muted accent for secondary visual elements

soft.description: Softer muted accent for tertiary elements

default.description: Default border for containers and dividers

strong.description: Stronger border for more visible separation

hover.description: Hover state border for form inputs

ai.description: Border color for AI-focused input elements

warning.description: Border for warning states (not tenant themeable)

ambient.description: Subtle ambient shadow for soft depth

base.description: Primary shadow color for elevated elements

primary.description: Primary accent for buttons and key actions

action.description: Tenant-themeable primary action color for CTAs

caution.description: Border for warning states (not tenant themeable)

critical.description: Tenant-themeable critical border for error states

primary.description: Tenant-themeable primary border for focused inputs

default.description: Tenant-themeable primary text and icon color

strong.description: Stronger tenant-themeable primary text and icon color

selected.description: Tenant-themeable text color for selected items

hover.description: Text color for hyperlinks on hover
State layer applied to accent colors on hover

pressed.description: State layer applied to accent colors while pressing
